defenses.visual_style: low timber roadward palisade following bank, ditch, and property edges

archetype_structure_northgate_east_home_.name: Home Interior
archetype_structure_northgate_east_home_.visual_story: A road-working household organized around wet cloaks, boots, letters, and irregular arrivals.

archetype_structure_northgate_far_east_h.name: Home Interior
archetype_structure_northgate_far_east_h.visual_story: A compact family home earning extra coin from a traveller's bed and lockable trunk space.

archetype_structure_northgate_south_home.name: Home Interior
archetype_structure_northgate_south_home.visual_story: Several generations share meals, sleep, childcare, and accumulated family possessions.

archetype_structure_northgate_southeast_.name: Home Interior
archetype_structure_northgate_southeast_.visual_story: Food growing and preserving shapes the room, with herbs, jars, and muddy tools close at hand.

archetype_structure_northgate_west_home_.name: Home Interior
archetype_structure_northgate_west_home_.visual_story: A careful solitary household with daily handwork kept beside the fire.
